claim_boundary: n=8 Phase 3 larger-system reduced-Pauli ZNE stress analysis only; not full tomography, backend-general entanglement dynamics, quantum advantage, or a full causal mechanism claim.

readout_mitigation.claim_boundary: full correlated readout pseudo-inversion for a singular larger-width assignment matrix; this is a sensitivity replay, not a physical correction for gate, basis-rotation, crosstalk, or coherent errors
readout_mitigation.source: full computational-basis readout calibration with singular-matrix fallback
